content:
# Session 23 — Recommendations for iter-024 plan

## CRITICAL — both lanes are now NORMAL prove/infra work; no wall remains
The iter-018→022 carrier-diamond wall on K1 is BROKEN (Gβ-composite re-ascription + `zeta:=false` + `erw`).
Do NOT re-open the carrier diamond, transport, or `letI`/`inferInstanceAs` routes — they are exhausted AND
no longer needed. Both residuals below have a concrete, verified route. This is the convergence iter.

## Priority 1 — K1 `hmon : hadj'.IsMonoidal` (`TensorObjSubstrate.lean`, L~4226) — `prove` mode
Closing it makes `chart_isIso` + `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` (seed-1) axiom-clean.
- **Route (verified, substrate023 + task_result):** `refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩` the two fields
  (`leftAdjoint_ε`, `leftAdjoint_μ`); prove each **sectionwise** via `PresheafOfModules.hom_ext` +
  `ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensor_ext`, reusing the **D3′ machinery already in this file**:
  `pushforward_μ_eq`, `restrictScalars_μ_app`, `forget₂_restrictScalars_μ_hom_tmul`,
  `pushforward_map_restrictScalars_μ_app_tmul` (`Gβ` is the same `restrictScalars`-composite shape they
  collapse on pure tensors). ~100–200 LOC, the μ-side analogue of the proved `pushforwardComp_lax_μ`.
- It is the δ/μ-side TWIN of the proved D2′ η-bridge `presheafUnit_comp_map_eta` — use that as a template.
- **effort-breaker candidate** if the ~150 LOC sectionwise proof is too big in one prover go: split into
  the two fields (ε-side trivially small; μ-side is the work).

## Priority 2 — Terminal `exists_tensorObj_inverse` (`TensorObjInverse.lean`) — TWO sub-steps, serialize
Gated on the connector + cocycle below; closing it (with seed-1) un-gates seed-3 `addCommGroup_via_tensorObj`.

### 2a (CHEAP, do FIRST) — connector lemma in `DualInverse.lean`
Residual B (L117) is BLOCKED only because `homOfLocalCompat` exports no restriction-value lemma. Assign a
prover/refactor to `TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse.lean` to ADD:
```
lemma homOfLocalCompat_restrictFunctor_map {X} {M N : X.Modules} {ι} (U) (hU) (f) (hf) (i) :
    (Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor (U i).ι).map (homOfLocalCompat U hU f hf) = f i
```
(or directly `IsIso (homOfLocalCompat …)` when each `f i` is iso). Proof reuses the internal `hconn` +
`IsGluing` `_hs` already present in the `def` (~40–80 LOC, same `topSectionToHom_app`/`homLocalSection`/
`presheafHom_map_app` calculus). Once exported, residual B closes by `rw [homOfLocalCompat_restrictFunctor_map]; exact hfiso x`.
- **Blueprint (inverse023 major):** give this connector a `\lean{}` block in `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`,
  natural companion to `lem:sheafofmodules_hom_of_local_compat`; wire into `rem:dual_discharges_inverse`'s `\uses`.

### 2b — cocycle `hf` (`TensorObjInverse.lean` L104) — `prove` mode, hard but self-contained
Push the `g·g⁻¹=1` transition-unit cancellation through `tensorObj_restrict_iso` / `tensorObjIsoOfIso` /
`dualIsoOfIso`. `eN` is built FROM `eM` on the SAME open, so the transition units cancel. These are GENUINE
ab-group section maps — `subsingleton`/`Subsingleton.elim` are the WRONG tool (verified). Large (multi-hundred-LOC
risk), touches no tensor stalk (d.2-free). **effort-breaker candidate.**
- **Blueprint (inverse023 major):** expand `rem:dual_discharges_inverse` prose — the cocycle is NOT
  "canonical hence agree"; it is the transition-unit cancellation through three iso constructors.

## Dispatch note — lanes are file-independent
K1 (`TensorObjSubstrate.lean`), connector (`DualInverse.lean`), cocycle (`TensorObjInverse.lean`) are three
DIFFERENT files → three parallel prover lanes are safe. Serialize ONLY: connector (2a) before residual-B is
re-attempted (B literally needs 2a's exported lemma).

## Stale `.lean` comments — next prover to fix (aud023 majors; review cannot edit `.lean`)
- `TensorObjSubstrate.lean` L159–162: drop `exists_tensorObj_inverse` from the "resident here" sub-module
  layout list (it MOVED to `TensorObjInverse.lean`); stop marking `pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial` as
  sorry-active (it is now closed; the live sorry is in `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion`).
- Minor style (aud023): deprecated `Sheaf.val`, unscoped `set_option maxHeartbeats`, flexible `simp`,
  empty section shell — low priority, fold into the next prover touch.

## Blueprint coverage debt
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 105 `lean_aux` nodes (stable, no NEW helpers this iter — both lanes used
  in-proof `let`/`have` locals, not new top-level decls). No new entries needed from this session beyond the
  connector lemma (2a) once it lands. The standing 105-node debt is carried from prior iters (pre-existing
  helpers without blueprint stubs); not introduced here.

## Do NOT re-assign / do NOT retry
- The K1 carrier diamond, `Functor.Monoidal.transport`, `letI`/`inferInstanceAs` of the bad-carrier instance,
  hand-built `e`+`hcompat` mate lemma — ALL exhausted AND now unnecessary (diamond resolved). The remaining
  K1 work is ONLY the sectionwise `hmon` (Priority 1).
- `subsingleton`/`Subsingleton.elim` on the terminal cocycle — verified wrong tool.
- Sheafify-the-evaluation shortcut for the terminal (re-hits the abandoned d.2 tensor-stalk gap) — DEAD.
